FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Interface IGpuDevice

Namespace
FluentGpu.Rhi
Assembly
FluentGpu.Rhi.dll

Graphics-first render hardware interface. Zero COM types cross this seam — generational handles + POD + spans only. SubmitDrawList(ReadOnlySpan<byte>, ReadOnlySpan<ulong>, in FrameInfo) is the PRIMARY hot path: the leaf walks the POD opcode stream with concrete devirtualized types. D3D12 is the reference backend; Rhi.Headless is the test backend; Metal slots in later behind this seam.

public interface IGpuDevice : IDisposable
Inherited Members
IDisposable.Dispose()

Properties

BackendName 

string BackendName { get; }

Property Value

string

Methods

CreateSwapchain(in SwapchainDesc) 

ISwapchain CreateSwapchain(in SwapchainDesc desc)

Parameters

desc SwapchainDesc

Returns

ISwapchain

EvictImage(int)

The residency manager evicted imageId — release its GPU texture (deferred behind the frame fence so an in-flight frame can't read freed memory). No-op if not resident.

void EvictImage(int imageId)

Parameters

imageId int

SubmitDrawList(ReadOnlySpan<byte>, ReadOnlySpan<ulong>, in FrameInfo)

Record + batch + submit the per-frame DrawList. drawList is the POD command stream.

void SubmitDrawList(ReadOnlySpan<byte> drawList, ReadOnlySpan<ulong> sortKeys, in FrameInfo ctx)

Parameters

drawList ReadOnlySpan<byte>
sortKeys ReadOnlySpan<ulong>
ctx FrameInfo

UploadImage(int, ReadOnlySpan<byte>, int, int)

Hand decoded PREMULTIPLIED BGRA8 pixels for imageId to the backend (the media-pipeline §4.1 texture upload). The backend create-or-replaces a resident texture (or atlas page) keyed by id and samples it from the DrawImage opcode. pbgra8 is valid only for this call — the backend copies it into its texture-staging ring; it is never retained. Rows may not be 256-aligned; the backend pads. Called once per decode completion, before SubmitDrawList(ReadOnlySpan<byte>, ReadOnlySpan<ulong>, in FrameInfo).

void UploadImage(int imageId, ReadOnlySpan<byte> pbgra8, int w, int h)

Parameters

imageId int
pbgra8 ReadOnlySpan<byte>
w int
h int
FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
